name: THE SEARCH | Nightstalkers | Overgrowth - Chapter I - Part I
description:
>>> THE SERIES WILL BE REVAMPED IN EARLY 2026 WITH NEW LORE AND STORY. <<<
CHAPTER I — "FAR CRY"
PART I — "THE SEARCH"

LORE SOURCES
“We are still delving into the mysteries of this world, so our database is not very impressive at the moment. Return here, Pioneer, to gain new information about the environment in which you will operate.”

>>> LORE OF THE WORLD <<<


POLS HAVE ENDED AND VOTING RESULTS ARE PUBLIC!

Vote in the poll to decide the fate of the Alpha-1 White Seagulls unit, as well as the direction of PART II of this chapter's storyline!

>>> VOTE HERE! <<<

The next bot in this series will arrive in two weeks (11.06.2025), and will continue the storyline depending on which option wins!

ALSO

Since I'll be mostly making mischief for the Overgrowth series now, I've put up a poll below where you can vote on which of my other series I should continue!

>>> VOTE HERE <<<

COMMUNITY
